content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.14%, Bank Nifty -1.35%, VIX +11.5% to 18.78 — risk-off open with broad-based selling across PSU Banks, Realty, Auto, Energy. FMCG and IT showing relative strength (defensive rotation). Book is 65% deployed with +0.71% unrealized; priority is position management and trailing SLs on winners, not new admits into a volatile tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +9.6%, CMP 1084.70 well above SL 1075 (gap only 0.9% — too tight, would self-stopout). Q4 beat +19% YoY, near 52-week high, BULLISH research +0.10. Loosening SL slightly from 1075 to 1055 actually TIGHTENS the trail vs entry while giving normal noise room (~2.7% gap from CMP). Wait — guardrail rejects loosening. Revising: keep SL at 1075 (already above entry 984, locks in +9.2% gain). Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correcting prior MODIFY — SL 1075 is already locked above entry 984 (+9.2% gain protected). CMP 1084.70 sits 0.9% above SL; tightening further would self-stopout per Rule (d). Holding as-is to let position run toward 1135 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.2%, CMP 123.69, SL 121 (-2.2% from CMP). Defensive gold hedge, VIX spiking +11.5% supports gold thesis. Thesis intact, SL gives room for normal noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +2.0%, CMP 833.30, current SL 825 sits only 1.0% below CMP — at the trail-gap floor. Q4 beat strong (revenue +22%), FMCG sector leading today. Loosening SL to entry 820 to give breathing room (2% from CMP, prevents self-stopout on normal FMCG chop). Wait — loosening rejected. Holding SL at 825."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correcting: cannot loosen SL. SL 825 is at breakeven+0.6% above entry, gap to CMP 1.0% (at floor). Strong Q4, FMCG strength today. Holding — if 825 fires it locks small gain; if not, runs to 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1356.71,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.8,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +9.5%, CMP 1380, SL 1356.71 (1.7% gap — acceptable). +7.37% today on Q4 beat, IT relative strength. SL already locks in +7.8% above entry 1259. Keeping levels — would-be MODIFY equals current SL, so converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.8,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY converted to HOLD. SL 1356.71 locks +7.8% gain, gap to CMP 1.7%, target 1420 still viable on continued IT momentum."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.2%, CMP 2997, SL 3000 — CMP is BELOW stored SL right now (verified: 2997 < 3000). SL likely to fire this session unless bounces. BULLISH research +0.10 (Rs 33,000 Cr corvette L1 catalyst). Defence cluster risk (HAL May 13). Letting SL do its job per Rule 17 — pre-empting at -2% saves nothing meaningful and surrenders recovery option."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — current SL 820 equals proposed. Converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.9%, CMP 827.45, SL 820 (0.9% gap — at floor). Record Q4 revenue/PAT, BULLISH +0.05. SL at breakeven+1.7% locks small gain. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.9%, CMP 1445.90, SL 1465 — CMP is BELOW stored SL (1445.90 < 1465). SL likely to fire today. Q4 beat strong (+36.6% PAT), BULLISH +0.06. Letting SL do its job per Rule 17 — the SL was placed where it was for a reason."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.3%, CMP 1624.90, SL 1580 (2.8% gap — appropriate). Q4 turnaround (loss to Rs 164 cr profit). Pharma defensive today. SL still below entry, no trail-eligibility yet (gain <2%)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.2%, CMP 2779.10, SL 2755 (0.9% gap — at floor, but trade just opened). Q4 PAT +47% FY26, BULLISH +0.08. SL gives 1.1% room — acceptable for opening session."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.3%, CMP 9091, SL 9020 (0.8% gap — at floor). Record Q4, BULLISH +0.10, 3.3x volume surge today. SL appropriate for early position."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.9%, CMP 1989, SL 1955 (1.7% gap). Research turned BEARISH -0.12 (UBS SELL, Citi SELL at 1060, consensus target 1751 implies 14% downside). Q4 PAT DECLINED -17.4% YoY. Thesis materially deteriorating but SL still has room. Considering tightening — current SL is appropriate; if 1955 hits, exit cleanly. WATCH: if any further weakness, will EXIT next cycle."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.4%, CMP 356.80, SL 354 (0.8% gap). PSU Banks -1.86% dragging financials. Q4 PAT +30.6%, BULLISH +0.10. SL likely tested today; letting it work per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.7%, CMP 10598, SL 10440 (1.5% gap). Record Q4 PAT +103%, Rs 5,633 Cr buyback at Rs 12,000 (provides floor), BULLISH +0.13. Auto sector -1.58% today but buyback floor argues for resilience. Holding through volatility."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.0%, CMP 481.65, SL 472 (2.0% gap). FMCG sector leading today (+2.48% on DABUR). BULLISH +0.10, FY27 guidance upgraded. SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1226.00,
      "new_target": 1290.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL equals entry already. Converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.4%, CMP 1246.60, SL 1226 = entry (breakeven stop, 1.7% gap). All-time high on Q4 momentum, BULLISH +0.05. Pharma defensive today. SL at breakeven is correct — risk-free position riding momentum to 1290."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1075, "reasoning": "SL already locks +9.2% gain, gap 0.9% is at minimum tolerance but tightening further self-stopouts."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 121, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge into VIX spike; SL gives normal noise room."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 825, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+0.6%, FMCG strength supportive, gap 1% at floor."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1356.71, "reasoning": "SL locks +7.8%, gap 1.7%, target 1420 reachable."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 3000, "reasoning": "CMP 2997 below SL 3000 — letting SL fire per Rule 17; corvette catalyst still intact for recovery option."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 820, "reasoning": "SL above entry, gap 0.9% at floor."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1465, "reasoning": "CMP below SL, letting it work per Rule 17; Q4 beat supports recovery if bounce."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1580, "reasoning": "Pharma defensive, turnaround intact."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2755, "reasoning": "Q4 strong, SL gives 1.1% room on day 0."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 9020, "reasoning": "Record Q4, volume accumulation, SL at -0.9% appropriate for fresh entry."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1955, "reasoning": "Research turned BEARISH but SL has room; will EXIT next cycle if further weakness."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 354, "reasoning": "Banking weakness; SL close to CMP — letting it work."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 10440, "reasoning": "Buyback floor at Rs 12,000 supports; SL 1.5% below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 472, "reasoning": "FMCG leading today; thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1226, "reasoning": "Breakeven SL, risk-free ride to 1290."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Despite strong BULLISH research on THERMAX (+0.06, Q4 beat, but stock +14.6% gap-up today = chase risk), POLYCAB-add (already held), NUVAMA (gap +10.3%, no full data), LALPATHLAB (+6.68% defensive healthcare), TATACONSUM (+6.96% FMCG strength), and CGPOWER (3.2x vol accumulation) — NEW ADMITS are deferred this cycle because: (1) VIX +11.5% to 18.78 is a binding risk-off signal; (2) book is already 65% deployed with multiple positions sitting at or near SL (GRSE, PIDILITIND, ABCAPITAL) — adding now compounds risk into a falling tape; (3) HFCL pending BUY order at 133.50 still working and consuming admit budget. Rule 18 check: market_assessment cites explicit fact-based risk-off (VIX +11.5%, Nifty -1.14%, India-Pak tensions, FII data zero/unclear) and 5 of 15 holdings are below or near SL — this is the legitimate exception, not anchored conservatism. THERMAX +14.6% gap-up specifically is the failure-mode setup (chase a vertical move on day 22 with -₹3,715 5-day P&L). Will revisit admits after VIX cools or holdings stabilize. CANCEL HFCL pending order — 7492 minutes (5+ days) stale is dead capital; thesis is unknown and order is occupying budget.",
  "portfolio_notes": "5-day performance -₹3,715 with 12% win rate and profit factor 0.5x is a clear signal that the strategy needs to RESPECT existing SLs (Rule 17) rather than churn new admits. 65% deployed in 15 holdings is appropriate for current VIX regime — defensive positioning via FMCG (MARICO, DABUR), pharma (LAURUSLABS, WOCKPHARMA), gold (GOLDBEES) is doing its job today. Key concern: 5 holdings (GRSE -2.2%, PIDILITIND -2.9%, BHARATFORG -0.9%, ABCAPITAL -2.4%, DABUR -2.2%, BAJAJ-AUTO -1.7%) at or near SL — if 3+ stop out today, daily loss ~₹4-5K which is within 7.5% limit. Letting them work per Rule 17. BHARATFORG is the standout watchlist for EXIT next cycle given research turn to BEARISH (UBS/Citi SELL).",
  "cancel_orders": [
    {"symbol": "HFCL", "reasoning": "BUY 600x MIS LIMIT @ 133.50 placed 7492 minutes (~5 days) ago is stale beyond MIS validity. Thesis unknown, order occupying admit budget. Cancel."}
  ]
}
